sentences.text: Thank you for calling Dark Properties. Please note in response to C O. V. I. D. nineteen offices are current clothes. However staff is monitoring and responding to messages and urgencies. If this is an emergency such as fire flood lockout or no heat, please

press Pound to reach our on call after our service. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. If you do not know your party's extension but no their last name press eight or press one for a list of department. If you would like to leave a message in our general voice mailbox, please press zero or remain on the line. This key is not valid. Please try again. Thank you for calling Dark Properties. Please note and respond to COVID nineteen Our offices are currently closed however staff is monitoring and responding to messages and emergencies if this is an emergency such as fire flood lockout or no heat, please press pound to reach our on call after our service. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. If you do not know your party's extension but no their last name press eight or press one for a list of department. If you would like to leave a message in our general Voice Box department menu plus zero for our group operator, one for human resources two for rental payments, three for online payments four for Dark Executive Suite five for facility six
for our I. T. Department and at any time you can press nine to repeat this menu. Thank you and have a nice day.
